message:
Running command: # 15,778 violations at 40% of iteration 2 (DRT repair iteration 2).
# Violations reduced from 83,662 → 15,778 in first repair iteration. 
# Good convergence! 40 iterations total - should reduce much further.
# Runtime: 1h01min so far for DRT, still at step 34.
sleep 1800
ps -p 531004 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "DRT ENDED"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -8
tail -5 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log
